problem: Diagram drag lag remained after multiple performance contours.
current_hypothesis: React bundle re-rendering dominates CPU (~95%) during drag; bpmn-js engine cost is minimal (~0.5%). Decomposition and viewer-first design are the most promising mitigation paths.
rejected_hypotheses: Pointermove event frequency is the primary bottleneck (addressed but insufficient)
bpmn-js engine is the primary bottleneck (profiler evidence contradicts this)
evidence: Profiler evidence from perf/diagram-modeler-drag-hot-path-and-pointermove-suppression-v1 shows React bundle at ~95% CPU and bpmn-js at ~0.5% during drag. Real drag baseline from fix/diagram-real-drag-performance-and-engine-decomposition-v1 confirms user-observed lag.

problem: React bundle consumes ~95% CPU during diagram drag interactions.
current_hypothesis: React reconciliation and state updates triggered by pointer move events cause frame drops. Canvas controller decomposition and selective re-rendering are needed.
rejected_hypotheses: bpmn-js SVG rendering is the bottleneck (profiler shows it is ~0.5%)
Network latency is the bottleneck (local runtime, no network during drag)
evidence: CPU profile captured in perf/diagram-modeler-drag-hot-path-and-pointermove-suppression-v1/PROFILER_EVIDENCE.md shows React at ~95% and bpmn-js at ~0.5%.

problem: BM25 lexical search initially achieved only 3/7 on validation queries.
current_hypothesis: Full manifest + source-balanced coverage + improved ranking (word-boundary, canonical boost, prompt penalty, recency tiers) resolved retrieval quality issues.
rejected_hypotheses: BM25 is fundamentally unsuitable (7/7 PASS achieved on full manifest with tuning)
Sample capping is acceptable (500-file cap caused failures; full manifest required)
evidence: Coverage hardening contour achieved 7/7 PASS on 1,803 files across 8 sources. Reviewer independently confirmed 7/7 PASS.

problem: Structured facts registry exists but is not yet integrated into agent preflight workflow.
current_hypothesis: Agents still query BM25 first. A facts-first bridge (query facts registry, then append BM25 snippets) will improve determinism and reduce generic-query competition.
evidence: This contour (feature/processmap-agent-rag-structured-facts-registry-v1) delivers the facts schema, curated facts, validator, and lookup CLI. Bridge integration is the next step.
